codeReview.summary: Reviewed feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 7af90bf diff. Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: all 4 connect routes now enforce auth with 401, all 4 callback routes validate OAuth state, callbacks store tokens via direct getServerClient().database upsert (no self-fetch), tokens are encrypted before persistence, OAuth cookies are cleared on success, and callbacks redirect to /settings with success/error query params.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-level API route convention is slightly misaligned for OAuth callbacks. AGENTS.md says all API routes should call getAuthenticatedUser() as the first line and return 401 when missing auth, but callback flows intentionally validate OAuth state first and use redirect error UX instead of JSON 401.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md lines 33-34 define first-line auth + 401. Callback handlers currently return redirectWithError('Not authenticated. Please log in first.') at src/app/api/social-accounts/callback/twitter/route.ts:39, linkedin/route.ts:30, instagram/route.ts:30, threads/route.ts:30.

summary: Code review passed with no blocking or non-blocking defects in the feature diff. One shared-state convention mismatch was observed between generic API-route guidance and OAuth callback UX/auth flow behavior.
